name: Marylander | LEXINGTON & CONCORD
description:
MARYLANDER MY GOATTT!!!!! art is by katamemories, i found it on the l&c discord server.

pretty difficult for me to think of a non-combative situation, since i didn’t wanna just copy the canonical baltimore route.

sorry for no big yaps, so i’ll use images as filler as usual


as i’m typing this, this is the pfp:

so, i may or may not do a in-game less-cute picture for the bot, so think of this as a placeholder pic. 

ignore this, im only typing this to get my bot in the search bar: Lexington and Concord
